info.title: dotnet-nodejs-linux
info.description: Install NodeJs using NuGet and dotnet tools (Linux only)

commands.name: init
commands.description: Unpacks the NodeJs binaries and adds the location to the PATH environment variable

commands.name: get-location
commands.description: Prints the location of the NodeJs binaries that should be added to the PATH environment variable

commands.name: reset
commands.description: Deletes the NodeJs binaries and removes the location from the PATH environment variable
